# CTFrameProgression.topToBottom

**Case**

Lines stack top to bottom for horizontal text.

## Declaration

```swift
case topToBottom
```

## Constants

- **CTFrameProgression.rightToLeft**: Lines stack right to left for vertical text.
- **CTFrameProgression.leftToRight**: Lines stack left to right for vertical text.
